name_cn:
Chanel 24c Makeup Box Bag
Size: 9.5x17x8
24c super cute long box bag
I was always indifferent to long box bags, but adding these small badge elements makes it much cuter
I absolutely love it and decided to buy it right away. The WOC in the same series is also cute, everyone can take a look.
Style A
